title: 有馬記念の後に・うそみたい

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan is losing steam with just meters to
go!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: (This can't be real.)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: (No, I just wish it wasn't...)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: And the grand prix glory goes to...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(No matter how fast I move my legs, how hard I
run or try to push forward...)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: (It's still so far out of reach.)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Pant... Wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Blah blah blah blah.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Blah blah blah blah.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Blah blah blah blah.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Blah blah blah blah.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Blah blah blah blah.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: (Wonder what they're saying...)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(I mean, it's amazing they can even talk at all
after a race like that...)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...And so I have gleaned a lesson from this. I now know
what I must improve on.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I was too slow getting into a good position. I need to push ahead next time and fight for my spot.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: None of what they're saying makes any sense.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: But maybe that's just the Arima Kinen for you.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
They're all so smart and strong, having all these
smart-people discussions.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Starting next year, I'll be running with people like
them the whole time. This'll be the new normal.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: And I'll just keep losing and losing and losing...

text_block_list.name: Gyarus
text_block_list.text: You got this, Jordan!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Am I ever gonna stop embarrassing myself?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: It's like we're from totally different planets.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's right before the winning concert. Tosen
Jordan is wearing her school uniform instead of
her concert outfit.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Oh. Yeah, I'm okay. Why?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hah... haha... That's right. Silly me. Gotta fix that.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hah, what a silly mistake. ☆ Anyway, would you
get out already so I can change?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell me you were hoping to sneak a peek. I
got a lawsuit with your name on it if so! ☆ Now
hurry up and get out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tosen Jordan shoves me out of the room.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ugh... I'm so cringe!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Like, stop dreaming and face reality already.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I did the research. I prepared.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Palmer was amazing even before her Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
She had strength, she had spirit... She was a
badass who'd already won the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: It all makes sense now that I think about it.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I don't have natural instincts like Helios.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I'm not a jack-of-all-trades like City.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I don't even have the brains to think clearly like
her.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Haha... Although, I do feel like maybe I've gotten
a little smarter.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Trainer has done so much for me, but...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: But none of it matters because I... I...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Haha... How did I not realize until now?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I really am a dummy...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan and I leave Nakayama Racecourse
and head back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She didn't take first place, but it was still a good
experience for her. I'm sure she'll do even better
next time.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh! Um... What were we talking about?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ah... Right. Uhhh...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I'm kinda tired. Sorry, but can we do this
tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Later, Trainer. Thanks for everything.

text_block_list.name: Gyaru A
text_block_list.text:
Jordan! About the party... How about instead of
just grabbing food, we go on a mini trip instead?

text_block_list.name: Gyaru B
text_block_list.text:
My mom said she'd drive us! She said we should
really relax and enjoy our time off.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, that sounds nice. It'd be like closure, you
know?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Cause it's all over for me...

text_block_list.name: Gyaru C
text_block_list.text:
Uh, Jordan? Are you too tired today? Wanna talk
about it tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, no, I just, uh... meant to say that I'm in!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Let's do it. I'm down to go anywhere!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan's goal has always been to make it
big.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first leg of the Senior Spring Triple Crown
would be a natural next step. It's a G1 and 2,000
meters, a distance she excels at.
choice_data_list: The Osaka Hai would be perfect.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's just one small problem...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I put together a regimen for the rest of the year
to prepare her for the Osaka Hai and other G1's,
but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She never shows up to training.
